claim_boundary: This promotes exactly no q-series row: animal q2 correlation has SR150 fixed-8 retained-denominator pregrid evidence with 150/150 finite Wald/profile intervals, but Wald coverage 0.8800 and profile coverage 0.8867 are below nominal, MCSE is > 0.01, one boundary/convergence flag is retained, and upper-tail misses exceed lower-tail misses. This does not promote interval_status, coverage_status, inference_ready, supported, pedigree/Ainv bridge marshalling, q4/q8, REML, AI-REML, broad bridge support, or public support.
next_gate: Keep animal q2 planned/planned; miss diagnostic is banked in structured-re-q2-animal-correlation-miss-diagnostic.tsv; Fisher/Rose must decide whether to test a skew-aware correlation interval or other animal-specific calibration before any top-up or status edit.
